prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Menace Christmas
Tagline: Inspired by something, probably.
Theme: Trust isn't given. It's rented.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: ceramic owl, scarf with impossible timing, unopened letter

Cast:
- Daniel Sutton | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.4 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Noah Hawthorne | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.7 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Tess Hawthorne | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.63 | space=storage unit described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Gavin Dane | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.79 | space=toolshed described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed; inherited documents she should have burned
- Jenna Sutton | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=vineyard groundskeeper | threat_aura=0.38 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits
- Daniel Vale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.33 | space=marina tackle room described as seasonal materials | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Cole Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Derek Hale | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Noah Hawthorne is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Daniel Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Noah?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Cole. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Daniel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Gavin."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
